init

await Select a branch
snapshot
cmp stdout prompt

feed a
await
snapshot
cmp stdout filter

feed <Enter>

-- rows --
10
-- branches --
[
  {"branch": "echo"},
  {"branch": "alpha"},
  {"branch": "bravo"},
  {"branch": "charlie"},
  {"branch": "delta"},
  {"branch": "gamma"},
  {"branch": "hotel"},
  {"branch": "lambda"}
]
-- selected --
alpha
-- want --
alpha
-- prompt --
Select a branch:
echo
alpha ◀
bravo
charlie
delta
▼▼▼
-- filter --
Select a branch:
alpha ◀
bravo
charlie
delta
gamma
▼▼▼
